__source._realEquivalent: POST http://localhost:7070/consult on the running JupiterTreasuryAgent (src/agents/treasury-agent/index.ts) which runs an ACTUS PAM simulation against Jupiter Knitting Company's balance sheet for the candidate price. Balance-sheet snapshot at fixture-build time: currentBalance=â‚ą25,00,000, pendingOutflows=â‚ą14,00,000, availableLiquidity=â‚ą11,00,000, safetyThreshold=â‚ą3,00,000, unitProductionCost=â‚ą330, overheadPerOrder=â‚ą30,000, hurdleRateAnnual=12% p.a.
__source._demoNarrative: Snapshot verdict for the canonical demo deal: 50,000 units of FAB-COTTON-180GSM at â‚ą370/unit on Net 30 terms. ACTUS PAM (Seller=RPA): IED@t0 = -â‚ą1,65,30,000 production outflow, MD@t30 = +â‚ą2,18,30,000 invoice collection (including 18% GST on â‚ą1,85,00,000 revenue). Production cost (â‚ą1.653 Cr) exceeds available liquidity (â‚ą11L) by a wide margin â€” the cash-position check fails (projectedMinBalance â‚ą-1.543 Cr << safetyThreshold â‚ą3L). The deal IS margin-profitable (â‚ą18.07L net profit after â‚ą1.63L working-capital financing cost on the 30-day gap at 12% p.a.) AND NPV-positive (â‚ą50.87L at the 12% hurdle, GST-inclusive discounted cashflow). The cash-position guardrail rules â€” treasury rejects and counters with minViablePrice=â‚ą335/unit, computed as max(profitability-floor=335, NPV-floor=284, liquidity-premium-floor=335). The seller agent uses minViablePrice to drive its counter-offer to the buyer. Used in demo to drive the seller's L1-L2 counter-offer logic without requiring the live treasury agent to be running on port 7070. M2-Î˛.3's L2 executive consumes approved + minViablePrice + npvOfDeal + failReasons; the tactics engine consumes workingCapitalCost + projectedMinBalance + safetyThreshold for the effective-floor computation and per-round SOFR adjustment overlay. pricePerUnit and round in `result` are placeholder values reflecting the canonical scenario; the demo-mode provider overwrites both fields from the live consult() input so the audit reflects the actual negotiation context.
__source._realEquivalentNote: Switch to TREASURY_MODE=real (default) to query the live treasury agent at TREASURY_URL (default http://localhost:7070/consult). Real mode degrades to a failed ConsultationRecord (no throw) if the endpoint is unreachable; the M2-Î˛.4 wire-in path will choose between treasury-counter-offer (approved=false â†’ use minViablePrice) and treasury-approval (approved=true â†’ continue with buyer's price) regardless of which mode produced the record.

failReasons: Gap cash â‚ą-1,54,30,000 < safety threshold â‚ą3,00,000
